title: Get Involved
text:
We’re building a network of Ventura residents, advocates, cyclists, and pedestrians who want to make our streets safer. Whether you want to attend meetings, contribute data, or just stay informed, fill out the form below and we’ll be in touch.

  
  
    Loading form…
  



  Having trouble with the form?
  Email us directly.



Ways to get involved

Attend community meetings — Show up and speak at city planning and transportation meetings.
Map your observations — Report unsafe conditions, near-misses, and crash sites in your neighborhood.
Share the data — Help spread awareness by sharing our crash map with friends, neighbors, and on social media.
Write to officials — Use our Take Action page to email a decision maker today.
Volunteer — Help with data collection, community outreach, or event organizing.

title: Take Action
text:
Personalized messages from real residents carry weight. Use the form below to compose your message.You can use the template provided, or write your own letter. Add your neighborhood, a personal story, or a specific concern about a street near you. When you click Send Email, your default email app will open with the message ready to send.


  
    Who receives this email?
    This message goes to a local city decision maker working on transportation and street safety in Ventura.
    Your voice helps prioritize safer infrastructure for cyclists and pedestrians.
  

  
    
      Your Name
      
    
    
      Your Neighborhood (optional)
      
    
  

  
    Subject Line
    
  

  
    Your Message
    Honorable Representative,
    
We are writing to you with deep urgency and grief on behalf of our community — residents, cyclists, recreational users, and workers who live and travel throughout Ventura County and the greater tri-county area.




Sincerely,
[Your Name]
    0 characters
  

  ✉ Send Email to Decision Maker
  
    Clicking "Send Email" opens your default email application with this message pre-filled —
    you can review it before sending. Nothing is sent automatically.
  





Tips for writing an effective message

title: Crash Map
text:
Each dot represents a recorded crash involving a cyclist or pedestrian in Ventura County. Data is sourced from SWITRS using CHP reports and covers 1/1/2020 – 3/31/2026. Click any dot for date, location, and severity details.

  Pedestrian crash
  Bike + Pedestrian

title: Safer Streets for Pedestrians & Cyclists
text:
Get Involved
Ready to help make Ventura safer? Fill out our community interest form to let us know how you’d like to contribute — from advocacy to outreach to data collection.
Want to speak up directly? Email a city decision maker →
